name: Inspired
narrative: Inspired is making a case for best jungler in the league right now. Methodical, creative, and quietly dominant — FlyQuest's run this split starts and ends with his pathing.

name: Blaber
narrative: Blaber is playing the best League of his career — his aggressive early pathing is setting the pace before most teams have woken up. When Cloud9 win, he's usually the reason why.

name: Doublelift
narrative: The comeback story of the split. Doublelift looks reinvigorated — playing with a freedom that's infectious. Whether this is the last act or a genuine resurgence, it's worth watching.

name: CoreJJ
narrative: The veteran presence that keeps Team Liquid competitive even when the team is off. CoreJJ doesn't win games by himself — he stops them from being lost.

name: Busio
narrative: Busio's vision control is the silent engine behind FlyQuest's dominant early games — rarely highlighted, always essential. The support player who makes everyone else look better.

name: jojopyun
narrative: jojopyun has grown into one of the most dangerous mid laners in the LCS — his ability to create pressure across the map while staying ahead in lane is rare at any level.
